metadata.description: Community Cursor plugin marketplace: rules, skills, and agents you can install together or per-plugin.

plugins.name: godev
plugins.description: Go rules (style, modules/tooling) and skills for TDT tests and Go code review.

plugins.name: gitworkflow
plugins.description: Branch naming, commit drafting, staged-diff review, and PR summaries (skills + commands).

plugins.name: specdocs
plugins.description: Spec-driven docs: canonical docs/ layout (planning/roadmap, features, ideas), feature specs, ADRs, doc sync skills, commands, optional edit hook.
